summary: Marketing Spreadsheet Upload/Download Feature - All tests passed. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified - Export button, Upload button, Download Template, File upload, Preview table, Remove row, Back button, Confirm button, Warning message.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

seed_data_creation: Test posts created and cleaned up during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Spreadsheet Upload/Download feature fully tested. GET /api/marketing/template returns xlsx template with sample row and instructions sheet. GET /api/marketing/export?month=X&year=Y returns xlsx with existing posts. POST /api/marketing/upload-preview parses xlsx/csv and returns rows with validation (missing date, missing concept, invalid content type marked as errors). POST /api/marketing/upload-confirm replaces all posts for the month with uploaded data, returns deleted and inserted counts. Frontend: Export button downloads xlsx, Upload button opens slide-out sheet, Download Template button downloads template, File upload accepts xlsx/csv and shows preview, Preview table shows parsed rows with status badges and platform icons, Remove row button (X) removes rows from preview, Back button returns to choose step, Confirm button saves data.

Backend_API_Tests.GET_template_returns_xlsx: PASSED - Returns xlsx file with proper content-type and disposition
Backend_API_Tests.GET_export_returns_xlsx: PASSED - Returns xlsx for April 2026 with filename marketing_calendar_2026_04.xlsx
Backend_API_Tests.GET_export_empty_month: PASSED - Returns valid xlsx even for months with no posts
Backend_API_Tests.POST_upload_preview_parses_xlsx: PASSED - Parses exported xlsx and returns rows with validation
Backend_API_Tests.POST_upload_preview_parses_template: PASSED - Parses template file with sample row
Backend_API_Tests.POST_upload_preview_validates_missing_da: PASSED - Marks rows with missing date as invalid
Backend_API_Tests.POST_upload_preview_validates_missing_co: PASSED - Marks rows with missing concept as invalid
Backend_API_Tests.POST_upload_preview_validates_invalid_co: PASSED - Marks rows with invalid content type as invalid
Backend_API_Tests.POST_upload_confirm_replaces_posts: PASSED - Deletes existing posts and inserts new ones
Backend_API_Tests.POST_upload_confirm_returns_counts: PASSED - Returns deleted and inserted counts
Backend_API_Tests.End_to_end_upload_flow: PASSED - Export -> Preview -> Confirm flow works

Frontend_UI_Tests.Upload_button_opens_sheet: PASSED - Sheet opens with title 'Upload Calendar'
Frontend_UI_Tests.Warning_message_visible: PASSED - Warning about replacing posts is visible
Frontend_UI_Tests.Preview_shows_status_badges: PASSED - Status badges (Draft, Review, Scheduled) visible
Frontend_UI_Tests.Preview_shows_platform_icons: PASSED - Platform icons visible in preview
Frontend_UI_Tests.Remove_row_button_works: PASSED - Clicking X removes row from preview (3 -> 2 rows)
Frontend_UI_Tests.Back_button_returns_to_choose: PASSED - Returns to choose step with Download Template visible
